summary: Implemented offline feed support with network detection, feedback queueing, and cached content display. Created useNetworkStatus and useOfflineQueue hooks, OfflineBanner and QueueIndicator components, and integrated offline support into SubscriptionFeedScreen. All acceptance criteria met: offline banner appears when network lost, last 50 items cached for offline access, feedback queued with indicator, auto-flush when back online, 7-day cache expiration, and cached content accessible offline.
